hero.headline: Bring your ideas
hero.subtext: Home-based custom 3D printing — personalised gifts, home organisation, functional prototypes and more. Printed with precision, delivered with care.

products.label: What we make
products.title: Four categories, endless possibilities
products.subtitle: Every item is printed to order — custom sizes, colours and text always available.

items.title: Home & Organisation
items.description: Practical prints that make your space work smarter — designed for real life, printed to fit.

items.title: Prototypes & Parts
items.description: Need a custom bracket, replacement part or a prototype for your idea? We print it precisely.

items.title: Custom Name & Text
items.description: Personalised with any name, word or short message — perfect for gifts that actually mean something.

items.title: Gifts & Décor
items.description: Decorative prints and thoughtful gifts that stand out — unique, durable and made to order.

how.label: The process
how.title: Order in 3 simple steps
how.subtitle: No complicated forms. Just send an email and we'll handle the rest.

steps.title: Tell us what you need
steps.description: Click the order button and send us an email with what you'd like — name, size, colour, quantity. Not sure? Just describe your idea.

steps.title: Get a quote & confirm
steps.description: We'll reply within 24 hours with a price, estimated time, and a preview if needed. You confirm before anything is printed.

steps.title: Receive your print
steps.description: We print it and arrange delivery or pickup. Payment by bank transfer or PayPal once you're happy with the result.

gallery.label: Portfolio
gallery.title: Recent work
gallery.subtitle: Our latest prints — add your own photos here once you have them.
gallery.note: 📸 More photos coming soon — follow us for updates

pricing.label: Pricing guide
pricing.title: Transparent, fair pricing
pricing.subtitle: Every order is quoted individually — here's a rough guide. Final price depends on size, complexity, and material.
pricing.note: 💡 Not sure about the price? Just email us — quotes are free, fast and come with no obligation.

order.label: Ready to order?
order.title: Let's make something
order.subtitle: Send us an email with your idea — no need to have all the details figured out. We'll help you get there.
order.sub_text: We reply within 24 hours · No upfront payment · Free quote

items.q: What materials do you print with?
items.a: Primarily PLA and PETG — durable, food-safe options available on request. PLA is great for most decorative and functional items. PETG is tougher and heat-resistant.

items.q: Can I request a custom design I found online?
items.a: Yes — send us a link or the file. We work with STL, 3MF and STEP files. If you have a sketch or photo, we can often model something simple for a small design fee.
Bank transfer (Überweisung) or PayPal. Payment is due after you've seen the final item — we don't ask for money upfront unless it's a large bulk order.
Yes, we ship within Germany via DHL. Shipping cost is added to the order. Local pickup is also available.
Most small items are ready in 2–3 days. Larger or more complex prints take 4–7 days. We'll always confirm the timeline before you commit.

items.q: What if I'm not happy with the result?
items.a: We'll reprint or refund. Quality matters to us — we send photos before shipping so you can check before we pack it.
